title: Nobody Love
why_this_song: Nobody Love by Tori Kelly (2015) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 31 times; first heard in: "But we ain't going anywhere tonight (Okay, okay)"
Appears 31 times; first heard in: "Ain't nobody love, ain't nobody love like you do"
Appears 14 times; first heard in: "(Okay, okay)"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Everybody's looking for that something (Okay, okay)"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "(To feel this good when I'm with you)"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "ain't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "ain't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "nobody" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Everyone is scared of going nowhere (Okay, okay)
Bring the conversation back to us, oh yeah
I want you here and now

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Nobody Love" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Nobody Love" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Nobody Love", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Nobody Love", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Nobody Love" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Nobody Love" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
